title: pfaffia lanata var. oblongifolia
intro: Pfaffia lanata var. oblongifolia is a plant species, also known as suma or Brazilian ginseng, belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, stress, and digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Pfaffia lanata var. oblongifolia include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine in South America, particularly in Brazil.
